'''Orion IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Orion IV was located in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], at the edge of the [[Indrexu Spiral]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> It was a terrestrial planet with a violet-colored sky.<ref name="X-Wing" /> Orion IV was one of the poor worlds of the [[Back Spiral]]. It was an ordinary manufacturing world.<ref name="Xim Week" />

==History==
[[File:Orioniv.png|thumb|left|Orion IV after being secured by the Empire.]]

Orion IV tipped into near-open rebellion shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> The planet hosted a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Orion IV Rebel base|base]] that was [[Battle of Orion IV|destroyed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as part of [[Operation Strike Fear]].<ref name="X-Wing" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
